profile_route.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=180 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-pass175-profile cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64|lu_1024x1024_f64|cholesky_1024x1024_f64|qr_1024x1024_f64|pinv_256x128_f64|svd_48x48_f64|eig_48x48_f64)' --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --noplot

lever.description: Split each existing threaded blocked-GEMM row block into fixed 64-row cache-sized morsels before dispatching the KC-blocked kernel.
lever.alien_graveyard_primitive: polyhedral loop scheduling / vectorized morsel-style execution with smaller private working sets

same_worker_candidate.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=180 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-p1vbf45-candidate2 cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64' --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --noplot

proof.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=180 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-p1vbf45-proof cargo test -p fj-lax --lib matmul_2d -- --nocapture

isomorphism.row_ownership: unchanged: every output row stays in one worker-owned mutable slice
isomorphism.accumulation_order: unchanged per output element: pc blocks and l within each pc remain ascending over k
isomorphism.ordering_and_tie_breaking: deterministic row-block ordering changes only across independent rows; no tie-breaking surface
isomorphism.floating_point_surface: candidate proof covered bit-identical packed/threaded/blocked/special-value matmul outputs

decision.reason: Same-worker fmd candidate regressed GEMM2048 from 171.27 ms median to 192.50 ms median.
decision.next_primitive: Stop exact-order GEMM row-morsel scheduling. Route the next GEMM work to explicit FP-tolerance/contract artifacts that can unlock recursive or communication-avoiding GEMM, or reprofile and attack a top non-GEMM BLAS/LAPACK structural primitive.
